programme.title: The Jesse Ownes Stories
programme.desc: In the 1960s Jesse Owens Dorian Harewood is accused of tax evasion So court-appointed investigator Lew Gilbert Georg Stanford Brown takes a look into Owens back story What he finds is a life full of both adversity and triumph As a young man Owens faces racism on a daily basis but eventually teams up with white coach Charles Riley George Kennedy and pushes his way into the 1936 Olympics There he triumphs in the face of Hitler and serves as a beacon for black America

programme.title: The Golden Voyage of Sinbad
programme.desc: Sinbad and the vizier of Marabia followed by evil magician Koura seek the three golden tablets that can gain them access to the ancient temple of the Oracle of All Knowledge

programme.title: Surf Ninjas
programme.desc: Brothers Johnny and Adam surfers from California discover that they are in fact heirs to a tiny South Pacific island nation They also discover their hidden talents while fending off a warlord

programme.title: TBH 126
programme.desc: TBH 126

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S05E25
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S05E25

programme.title: Munsters 137
programme.desc: Munsters 137

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: The story revolves around Shane a bounty hunter who helps a family of farmers being harassed by the local goons

programme.title: Colorado
programme.desc: Trouble in Colorado is tying up Union troops needed back east during the Civil War and Lieut Burke is sent to investigate Macklin and his gang are causing the problems and Capt Mason joins them When Burke catches up with them he also finds Mason his brother

programme.title: Man of the Forest
programme.desc: The kidnapping of an heir to a ranch goes awry when the Man of the Forest mistrusted by the heiress takes matters into his own hands with the help of his pet cougar

programme.title: Rollin Plains
programme.desc: Its cattlemen versus sheepmen and Trigger Gargan appears to be the leader of the gang causing the trouble But unknown to Ranger Tex Lawrence the respected town citizen Barrow is the boss and is tipping off the gang as to the Rangers activities

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A cowboy detective goes up against a gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The Cannonballs arch enemy Homer Bedloe has arrived in the valley on some undisclosed business All he seems to be doing is riding the train Sam and Joe believe hes out to get Wendell who they think will incriminate himself through his naivety honesty and helpful manner at all cost as much of that help isnt part of his railroad job and as the result of his actions often is at the expense of keeping on schedule They ultimately learn that Bedloe is watching Wendells performance to use as an excuse to scrap the Cannonball in favor of a bus service for the valley which in turn would put the Shady Rest out of business as there is no road that goes by the hotel Although Bedloe requires an impartial and reliable third party verification of his report he is hoping to use Janet Janet in turn comes up with an idea that no one else in the valley has ever thought about in dealing with Bedloes mean ways A cake sent to the Elliotts from Granny in Beverly Hills plays an unwitting but ultimately important part in Janets plan

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A commercial psychic uses a mystic hearing aid to read the thoughts of his audience

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy goes after a Springwood teenager whos stuck working at a burger joint owned by his father

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Reno and Sam are a pair of hardcore gamblers who dont play for fun They challenge each other in a simple game of cards and the end result could be deadlier then they couldve ever bargained for

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: The gold-digging landowner of a Caribbean villa attempts to woo a haughty rich young woman with the aid of a potion made by his ex-lover; a voodoo priestess But trouble ensues when he ignores the warnings about the potion

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Self-centered yuppie lawyer Ted Miller reunites with Melody a former flame who clings to her 60s hippie ideals He lets her stay at his apartment but she sees that he sold out his youthful beliefs in favor of greed and materialism

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Desperate transgender woman Nina Russell hires prominent sleazy arrogant plastic surgeon Dr Christopher Hamilton to create an attractive face for her He operates on her after a night of drugging when he is unfit to hold a scalpel

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: On Halloween Eric sees the pentagram appear on his hand and knows his transformation into a werewolf is imminent He locks himself in an abandoned house not realizing that a disfigured recluse still lives there

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: A rancher comes after Eric when he befriends a she-wolf who earlier had attacked the rancher for killing her wolf pups

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: After Natalies brother is fatally wounded by a gunman she prevails upon Nick to turn him into a vampire giving him eternal life

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki discovers that a deadly item from her past has resurfaced a satanic coin that can bring the dead back to life

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans want to safely build a synthetic fuel plant in Stalag 13 but Hogan convinces them that there is oil beneath the camp

programme.title: Mchale 402
programme.desc: Mchale 402

programme.title: Mchales Navy
programme.desc: Ensign Charles Parker - Newly assigned to the 73 Crew as Executive Officer - Is Binghamtons last hope to tame McHale and his pirates Though Parker is unwelcome at first McHale sees potential in the young Officer and orders his Crew to shape up so that Parker wont be shipped out

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carter tries to make Gomer dislike him before graduation feeling that he hasnt done his job correctly if he isnt hated by ALL the recruits Sgt Carter asks for a transfer to California but things dont go quite as he expects

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Its Survival Training for the platoon two-man teams must rough it for five days Thinking Gomer will bring down the platoons rating Sgt Carter takes him for his partner Gomers small-town backwoods upbringing turns out to be an asset

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A big-game hunter arrives on the island Upon learning there is nothing on the island to hunt he chooses instead to hunt one of the castaways--and he chooses Gilligan

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: An ape man wreaks havoc on the island and frightens the castaways who dont realize that he is actually a Hollywood actor preparing for a role

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Grandpa injures his arm he sorely regrets that he stubbornly and secretly refused to join the rest of the family in taking out a group health insurance policy offered by the Grange

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Grandpa and George MacMichael realize that their house painting contracts with the Sparkle Paint Company are a fraud they utilize a ruse to try to recover their money

programme.title: Smart 422
programme.desc: Smart 422

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The college students who hire BJ to haul equipment for a talent show secretly plan to his rig as a gambling casino

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Ed starts giving Wilbur nothing but winning picks at the race track everyone wants to get in on the gravy train - including Carol and Kays milk fund for the school kids

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed writes and sings a song that is destined to become a hit record Of course Wilbur must pretend that its all him and not Ed

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Rusted-out plumbing collapses the emergency tunnel just as Hogan needs to get four Underground leaders out of Germany so he creates a health spa

programme.title: Bail Out
programme.desc: A sleazy bail bondsman thinks he has finally gotten his big break when a millionaire heiress gets busted with drug dealers If she shows up in court it could mean a million dollars to him If she doesnt he could be ruined When the deal gets too complicated he hires a playboy bounty hunter to keep an eye on his investment But who is going to keep an eye on him

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Love Boat

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Dr Russells presumed-dead husband mysteriously reappears on a reconnaissance mission to a nearby planet

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hazzard Jail is the meeting place for Black Jack Bender and a group of syndicate kingpins who are conspiring to smuggle illegal weapons in the area Bo and Luke - with a little help from Uncle Jesse Daisy and their friends Cletus and Cooter - use some good ol southern smarts to keep the mobsters at bay until the FBI can arrive to investigate

programme.title: Hercules 223
programme.desc: Hercules 223

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Augur is recruited by a Taelon weapons project but the others are worried about his involvement When the project is launched earlier than originally planned to fight a Jiridian fleet the Earth is in danger

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians encounter another human disease chicken pox which is crippling their invasion plans They decide by harvesting human brains so they can produce a cure that will put the invasion back on track Harrisons team race against time to stop them completing their project

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A vessel of alien pacifists bound for Earth lands on the moon They are greeted as friends by all- except Commissioner Simmons who sees their vessel as way to return home

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: At an off-season motel a woman turns to Kimble for help with her son who is an unusually bright but troubled child Kimble helps the boy so much that when he has to run from the local sheriff the boy follows after imperiling them both

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: When a sunken Barkley riverboat is finally found its cargo of gold is missing and the late family patriarch is suspected to have stolen it

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne rides into Stagge City pop 407 and is promptly arrested on trumped-up vagrant charges After a trial lasting less then a minute hes sentenced to 90 days hard-labor at the nearby silver mine - owned by Stagge

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A woman who has dedicated her life to a prominent family fails to see her neglected son has fallen in with a psycho - and may have helped him kill a woman

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A cocky sleazy and horny late night talk radio host brings in a sexy female guest who claims the aliens gave her the solution to evil in the world - a monster that eats bad people who agree to it He laughs it off at first

programme.desc: Kimbles David Janssen anti-smog crusading friend Laurence Naismith has him deliver a package secretly containing a bomb to a polluting factory unaware that children are there

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: Night of the Demons

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Teenage Halloween pranksters Shari Belafonte-Harper LeVar Burton Lee Montgomery revive a 300-year-old witch and some of her ghoul friends

programme.title: Howling III
programme.desc: A female werewolf runs away from her family and falls in love with a man who works in the movie business while a sociologist searches for proof of the werewolves existence

programme.title: Prophecy
programme.desc: A government health inspector is dispatched to assess the damage a logging company is causing to a patch of forest claimed by Native Americans and comes face to face with true terror wreaking havoc in the woods

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Herb Veckenstedt as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.

programme.desc: Xavier Sedras v. Jefferson George

programme.desc: Chris McMillan v. Mike Stripling

programme.desc: Hicham Achalhi v. Andre Schmeling

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Following Audrics signal the Lightning League enters the Pirates Guild zone commanded by the pirate queen Morgana an old love of Hercs The Pride is boarded robbed and Herc and Oon are taken prisoners Jayce Gillian and Flora follow them concealed by an invisible bubble Saw Boss is given Oon as his share of the loot but he recognizes him and insists upon having Jayce Morgana reluctantly attempts to force Herc to tell of Jayces whereabouts but then she changes sides and fights Saw Boss Jayce rescues Herc and Morgana and she gives up her pirating ways to fight Monster Minds
